article_meta.title: Of Course, There's a Biden Connection to DC's Fecal Fiasco Here's Something the Media Is Trying to Keep Quiet About Goldman Sachs' Top..

reasoning: The model flagged multiple items that are not the author’s own prose (site navigation/other articles’ headlines) and a paraphrased viewpoint clearly attributed to Charlie Kirk. It also mislabeled bias types on the remaining items and missed several clearer instances in the author’s own connecting prose (e.g., “stridently,” “rings hollow,” “seemingly violated,” “martyr”).

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged non-author navigation headlines and a paraphrased, clearly attributed viewpoint (Kirk’s) as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: 3 of 5 items are not genuine author-level bias (two site headlines; one attributed viewpoint).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-prose bias such as loaded wording (“stridently”), evaluative framing (“rings hollow”), unsubstantiated legal claim (“seemingly violated”), and emotive labeling (“martyr”).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For valid items, labels were off: “was murdered” should be Unsubstantiated Claims/Omission of Source Attribution; “storming” better fits Word Choice/Sensationalism; “gender ideology…” was attributed, not author slant.
